name: Cedar Valley's Wild Frontier Fun Park
notes: Small family fun park in Comins, Michigan. No Wikimedia Commons images available. Very small park with limited online photo presence.

notes: Thunderbolt roller coaster at Luna Park, Coney Island - dramatic landscape shot showing the modern park

notes: Desert Storm roller coaster at Castles N' Coasters, Phoenix, Arizona. Portrait orientation - may need cropping.

notes: Enchanted Forest theme park entrance/overview near Salem, Oregon

notes: Ocean City MD inlet area showing the Jolly Roger pier and boardwalk amusement area

name: Peppa Pig
notes: Peppa Pig World entrance at Paultons Park. Note: this is the UK location, not the US Florida/Texas parks, but best freely available image.

notes: Cinderella's Castle at Story Land theme park in Glen, New Hampshire

name: Western Playland
notes: Western Playland amusement park in Sunland Park, New Mexico (near El Paso). 800x480 - lower resolution.

name: Adventurers Family Entertainment Center
notes: Small family entertainment center in Brooklyn, NY (formerly Nellie Bly Amusement Park). Temporarily closed. No Wikimedia images available.

name: Andretti Thrill Park
notes: Family entertainment center in Melbourne, Florida with go-karts and mini golf. No Wikipedia or Wikimedia Commons images available.

name: Big Rivers Waterpark
notes: Water park and adventure park in New Caney, Texas (near Houston). No Wikipedia page or Wikimedia Commons images available.

name: Carousel Gardens Amusement Park
notes: Gate entrance of Carousel Gardens at New Orleans City Park, showing the historic carousel

name: Clementon Park
notes: Entrance to Clementon Park, New Jersey, February 2025

name: Deno's Wonder Wheel Amusement Park
notes: The iconic Wonder Wheel at Coney Island, landscape orientation shot showing the full ferris wheel

name: Fantasy Forest Flushing Meadows
notes: Small amusement park at Flushing Meadows Corona Park, Queens, NYC. No Wikimedia Commons images available.

name: Freehold Township NJ
notes: This is a township in New Jersey, not a theme park. iPlay America is located here but is an indoor FEC, not a traditional amusement park.

name: Funtimes Fun Park
notes: Small outdoor family entertainment center in Alliance, Ohio with ~20 rides. No Wikipedia page or Wikimedia Commons images available.

name: Gurnee Illinois
notes: This is a city in Illinois, not a theme park. Six Flags Great America is located in Gurnee but is already listed separately.

name: Illinois State Fair
notes: This is a seasonal state fair in Springfield, IL, not a permanent amusement park.

name: Kemah Boardwalk
notes: Kemah Boardwalk theme park on Galveston Bay, Texas - scenic boardwalk view

name: Lakeside Colorado
notes: Lakeside Amusement Park near Denver, Colorado, 1966 vintage photo showing the park and Tower of Jewels

name: Magic Kingdom Park
notes: Cinderella Castle at Magic Kingdom, Walt Disney World, 2024 photo. Portrait orientation - may need cropping for card background.

name: Miracle Strip Pier Park
notes: Former amusement park in Panama City Beach, FL. Closed in 2015, replaced by Swampy Jack's Wongo Adventure. Only logo SVG available on Wikimedia, no park photos.

name: New York-New York
notes: New York-New York Hotel and Casino on the Las Vegas Strip with Big Apple Coaster visible, wide landscape shot

name: Oaks Amusement Park
notes: Oaks Amusement Park in Portland, Oregon showing rides and park grounds

name: Pavilion Park
notes: Amusement park at Broadway at the Beach in Myrtle Beach, SC. No Wikipedia page or Wikimedia Commons images available.

name: Race City PCB
notes: Go-kart and ride park in Panama City Beach, FL. No Wikipedia page or Wikimedia Commons images available.

name: San Antonio's Incredible Pizza
notes: Indoor family entertainment center / pizza buffet chain. Not a traditional theme or amusement park.

name: Schnepf Farms
notes: Agritainment farm in Queen Creek, Arizona. Has some rides but is primarily a farm/festival venue, not a traditional amusement park.

name: Swampy Jack's Wongo Adventure
notes: Small themed amusement/FEC park in Panama City Beach, FL. No Wikipedia page or Wikimedia Commons images available.

name: Tweetsie Railroad
notes: Steam train at Tweetsie Railroad amusement park between Boone and Blowing Rock, North Carolina

name: Wonderland Amusement Park
notes: Hornet roller coaster at Wonderland Park in Amarillo, Texas
